business_name: Meeraz Clinic - Hair Transplant Clinic in Mumbai
address: MEERAZ CLINIC, Bungalow, no. 150 Jankidevi School Rd, Mhada Road, near MTNL, SV Patel Nagar, Andheri West
description:
Led by Dr Sulekha Patil, Meeraz Clinic is considered to be one of the best hair transplant clinic in Mumbai that provides Expert, Professional and Specialised Treatments For Hair along with Skin care, and Dental problems.

With Over 10 Years Of Experience In The Field of hair transplant, skin and dental care, Dr Sulekha started Meeraz Clinic With The Vision To Help Everyone Never Compromise On Their Looks, And Look Younger Than Their Age.

We evaluate the unique circumstances of your hair loss and recommend the best hair transplant in Mumbai. We provide a range of cutting-edge options, including FUE, FUT for individuals dealing with hair loss. Additionally, we offer non-surgical treatments like PRP therapy to promote hair regrowth.
